title: $bold
text: $bold Apply the bold character attribute to a string. $bold ( String ) Parameters Table 1. Parameters Parameter Data Type Description String String String on which to apply bold styling. Return Values Returns String with the bold character attribute applied. Use Use in Form components. Description The function $bold returns the result of applying the bold character attribute to String . The result is visible only in a displayed unifield. Example: Using $bold The following example changes the label of a field to bold when the field gets focus and removes it when it loses focus: trigger loseFocus putItem/id $labelProperties($fieldname), "text", $stripAttributes($valuePart($labelProperties($fieldname))) end trigger getFocus putItem/id $labelProperties($fieldname), "text", $bold($valuePart($labelProperties($fieldname))) end Copy Related Links stripattributes Remove character attributes, frames, and rulers from Source and put the result in Target. $stripattributes Return the result of removing character attributes, frames, and rulers from a string.
